response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings roughly 20 years of broad software engineering experience and genuine entrepreneurial spirit through his GISCollective work, but he falls meaningfully short of a director-level Principal Engineer — AI Strategy profile. His AI involvement is recent (current role since April 2025) and operational rather than strategic — MCP tooling and agentic scaffolding, not platform-level AI product ownership or thought leadership. There is no advanced degree in an AI-adjacent field, no evidence of external recognition as an AI expert (publications, keynotes, patents), and no experience advising enterprise customers or shaping cloud strategy at scale. The seniority gap between Staff/Senior IC and a Director-level IC role with external advisory responsibilities is substantial and not bridged by the resume.
strengths: ~20 years of continuous software engineering across web, embedded, infrastructure, and mobile — comfortably meets the 15-year minimum
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative and ability to ship and sustain an open-source platform independently
Active community contributor through workshops, conference talks, and open-source libraries, showing communication and knowledge-sharing instincts the role values
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent — limited to MCP tooling in the current role (~13 months); no demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized thought leadership
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or a related technical field, and the CS bachelor's is from a program with unclear accreditation details on the resume

No evidence of director-level scope: no cross-org technical strategy, no enterprise customer advisory work, and no history of influencing product or engineering roadmaps at a platform or business level
